description_long: This kindergarten consists of two main connected structures: a modern, angular black building with a sawtooth roof and a more traditional, rectangular brick building with a gabled roof. The modern section features large windows, dark cladding, and a stepped entrance, while the brick section has classic window arrangements and a lighter roof. The grounds include a fenced outdoor play area with a colorful basketball court and some playground equipment, as well as landscaped greenery and several mature trees. The property is bordered by a low metal fence and a sidewalk, with a main entrance accessible from the street. The overall layout is compact, with the play area nestled between the two buildings and the street. The design blends contemporary and traditional architectural elements, creating a visually engaging and functional space for children.
description: A kindergarten complex with a modern black angular building connected to a traditional brick structure, featuring a fenced play area, basketball court, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, the modern black building, the traditional brick building, and trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced basketball court, playground area, and the angular roofline of the modern building.
description_view_2: Rear aerial view displaying the play area, the connection between the two buildings, and the overall site layout.
description_view_3: Back-side view focusing on the stepped roof of the modern building and the rear landscaping.
